title: MGN 436 (M+F) Amendment 5 whole body vibration
body: "This notice should be read with MGN 636 (M) amendment 4 the merchant shipping and fishing vessels (health and safety at work) regulations 1997 and MGN 353 amendment 2 the merchant shipping and fishing vessels (control of vibration at work regulations 2007 and replaces MGN 436 Amendment 4.  Notice to:   operators managers owners builders of small vessels  "
